reasoning: I will vote for Biswajit Das and the TMC. Yes, I know he switched to BJP and back — this troubles me, truly. But one man's defection does not matter. What matters is the wall. Mamata-didi still stands between us and what happened in Assam, between us and NRC, between us and a state that makes one religion holier than another. Shantanu Thakur and his certificates are a show — the real machinery is in Delhi, and it wants to expose us. My daughter's stipend is real. My ration card works. As long as Mamata-didi stands, I am not afraid.
primary_drivers: Fear of NRC and Hindu nationalist machinery if BJP wins
Mamata as the protector and wall between Muslims and the Centre
Tangible material benefits from TMC (ration card, daughter's school stipend) vs. unknown future under BJP
